name: Pad Thai Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Bean Sprouts, rinsed and dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Place noodles in hot (not boiling) water. Let soak for 10 minutes, then drain.
2. In a small bowl, combine Nuoc Mam sauce, tomato sauce, and vinegar. Stir in sugar until dissolved.
3. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a wok or large frying pan over high heat. Cook garlic and chili pepper flakes for 15 seconds.
4. Add pork (or chicken) and shrimp to the wok. Stir fry until the meat changes color.
5. Add tofu pieces and the Nuoc Mam mixture to the wok, bring to a boil.
6. Add drained noodles and toss until well coated in sauce.
7. Transfer to a warm serving platter.
8. Add remaining oil to the wok. Add eggs and cook for 10 seconds.
9. Scramble eggs and add bean sprouts. Return noodles to the wok and thoroughly stir to mix eggs with noodles.
10. Continue cooking until eggs are set. Arrange noodles on a serving plate and garnish with chopped fresh coriander, coarsely chopped peanuts, minced green onions, and chopped dried shrimps. Serve immediately.
